title: cinnamomum tournefortii
intro: Cinnamomum tournefortii, also known as Chinese camphor, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum tournefortii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cinnamomum tournefortii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications and aromatherapy.
